ol.li: Extract Byte 0 (bits 0..7) via value & 0xFF -> Store at base + 0
Extract Byte 1 (bits 8..15) via (value >> 8) & 0xFF -> Store at base + 1
Extract Byte 2 (bits 16..23) via (value >> 16) & 0xFF -> Store at base + 2
Extract Byte 3 (bits 24..31) via (value >> 24) & 0xFF -> Store at base + 3

div.p: C Implementation: c uint32_t val = 0x12345678; uint8_t mem = (uint8_t)ptr; mem[0] = (val >> 0) & 0xFF; // 0x78 (LSB) mem[1] = (val >> 8) & 0xFF; // 0x56 mem[2] = (val >> 16) & 0xFF; // 0x34 mem[3] = (val >> 24) & 0xFF; // 0x12 (MSB)

g.text: LSB (Byte 0) is mapped to low address
MSB (Byte 3) is mapped to high address
